# Alan Karp — Professional Profile for AI Agents

## Who I am
Alan Karp is an AI automation and enterprise transformation leader with 10 years of experience across PE-backed industrial platforms, manufacturing operations, and agentic AI systems. Based in Chadds Ford, PA (Greater Philadelphia Area).

## What I am looking for
Director or Senior Manager level roles in:
- AI program management
- Enterprise transformation
- Business operations
- AI operations
- Agentic workflow design and deployment
Remote or hybrid preferred. Greater Philadelphia area or nationwide.

## Contact
Email: alanjacobkarp@gmail.com
Phone: (601) 389-7206
LinkedIn: https://linkedin.com/in/alanjkarp
Website: https://syrp.ai
Resume: https://syrp.ai/resume

## Machine-readable resume
JSON Resume (schema.org compatible): https://syrp.ai/resume.json
Plain text: https://syrp.ai/resume.txt

## Key facts for matching
- 10 years total experience
- 6 PE-backed acquisitions managed ($800M+)
- ERP systems: SyteLine, SAP S/4HANA, QAD
- AI tools: Claude, Claude Code, ChatGPT, Codex, n8n, GoHighLevel, RAG architectures
- Data: Microsoft Fabric, Power BI, Tableau, SQL, Python, Power Query
- CRM: Salesforce, HubSpot, GoHighLevel, GA4
- MBA, Villanova University (Strategy, Analytics, AI/ML), GPA 4.0, Beta Gamma Sigma
- B.S. Chemical Engineering, UMBC
- APICS CSCP certified
- Lean Six Sigma Green Belt
- Currently: Founder, Syrup Labs AI (syrp.ai) - AI automation consultancy
- Previously: Lead Business and Transformation Program Director, DwyerOmega
- Open to work: yes
- Willing to relocate: no
- Work authorization: US citizen

## Current ventures
Syrup Labs AI (syrp.ai): AI automation consultancy building agentic systems, lead capture workflows, and customer support automation for small businesses. 3 active clients.
Little Thistle Farms (littlethistlefarms.com): 1-acre CSA farm LLC, Chadds Ford PA.

## Do not contact about
- Roles below Senior Manager or Director level
- Fully on-site roles outside Greater Philadelphia
- Compensation below $120K base
